Elevate your home’s aesthetic with the timeless elegance of our 6.5ft White Cherry Blossom Tree. Artisan Craftsmanship Standing at 6.5 feet approx, this tree is engineered for impact. Each branch is reinforced with hidden wire, allowing you to customize the spread of the canopy—from a slender, upright silhouette to a wide, romantic arch. The blossoms are crafted from premium silk that resists dust and fading, ensuring your tree looks "in bloom" every single day of the year.

Versatile Styling Perfect for homeowners looking to create a "peaceful corner," this tree also serves as an incredible backdrop for photography, bridal showers, or professional office spaces. It adds life to "dead" corners and softens the look of modern furniture with its airy, delicate texture.

ELEGANCE REIMAGINED. THE YZ STANDARD.

In the world of YZ, light is the ultimate luxury. The Sadaf (Arabic for Mother of Pearl) is the embodiment of our philosophy: where ancient inspiration meets future technology.

A Silhouette of Serenity Drawing from the sacred geometry found in nature and the architectural fluidity of the East, the YZ Sadaf features a hypnotic, pleated facade. Its spiraling ribs evoke the protective elegance of a rare seashell, protecting the Nur (light) within. Every curve is intentional, designed to diffuse light into a soft, ethereal glow that transforms the mood of any room—from the executive suite to the private sanctuary.

The Craftsmanship of Tomorrow True luxury is responsible. The YZ Sadaf is realized through high-precision additive manufacturing, utilizing the finest Eco-Grade PLA Biomass. This allows us to achieve complex, organic textures impossible to replicate by hand, while remaining completely biodegradable. This is guilt-free opulence for the modern connoisseur.

The YZ Promise Owning a YZ piece is a statement of taste. The Sadaf stands on bespoke tripod legs, elevating the form and grounding the aesthetic. It is minimal, yet commanding.

Select Your Edition The YZ Sadaf is available in two exclusive sizes, curated to fit your lifestyle:

The Grand Edition (Large): A centerpiece that demands attention.

Dimensions: 20cm x 20cm x 28cm

The Petite Edition (Small): A subtle accent of refinement. Dimensions: 16cm x 16cm x 22cm

Technical Specifications

Brand: YZ

Model: Sadaf (Signature Series)

Material Composition: Premium PLA (Polylactic Acid) – 100% Sustainable Bio-Polymer.

Finish: Matte Architectural Texture.

Form Factor: Organic Ribbed Sphere on Tripod Base.

Sustainability Rating: 100% Eco-Friendly & Biodegradable

Elevate your interior design with the 5.5ft Natural-Look Artificial Filler Plant, the ultimate solution for bringing the outdoors in. In the world of professional staging and home decor, "filler plants" are the secret weapon used to soften harsh lines, hide unsightly corners, and add a layer of organic texture to a room.

A Masterpiece of Realism This isn't your average "plastic" plant. Every branch is strategically designed to mimic the irregular growth patterns of a live specimen. The foliage features a mix of young light-green buds and mature dark-green leaves, providing a depth and density that makes it a true statement piece. At 5.5 feet tall, it stands at eye level, making it the perfect backdrop for sofas, reading nooks, or office reception areas.

The "Fancy Pot" Difference We believe the container is just as important as the plant. This filler plant arrives housed in a curated fancy pot—a designer-grade planter chosen specifically to complement the plant’s silhouette. The pot is weighted to ensure maximum stability, preventing accidental tipping in high-traffic areas or households with pets and children.

Versatile Styling Whether your home follows a minimalist, farmhouse, or modern industrial aesthetic, this natural-look greenery integrates seamlessly. It is hypoallergenic, dust-resistant, and requires nothing more than an occasional wipe with a damp cloth to maintain its luster.

column3:
Upgrade your home or office aesthetic with our Fiber Round Planters, where sophisticated design meets industrial-grade durability. These aren't just pots; they are architectural accents designed to showcase your favorite flora in the best possible light.

The Perfect Blend of Form and Function The "Round" series is characterized by its clean lines and soft curves, providing a balanced look that softens the sharp angles of modern furniture. The fiberglass composite provides a premium, stone-like texture without the back-breaking weight. This makes it easier than ever to rearrange your balcony, patio, or living room whenever inspiration strikes.

Built to Last Our fiber planters are finished with a UV-protected coating to ensure that their deep, rich colors don't dull over time. The non-porous surface is easy to clean—a simple wipe with a damp cloth keeps them looking brand new. They serve as the perfect housing for large floor plants (like our 5.5ft Banana or 8ft Imli trees), providing the stability needed for tall arrangements.

Versatile Sizing for Every Project Available in a variety of diameters, these planters are deep enough to accommodate root systems for live plants or to provide a weighted base for top-heavy artificial trees. Their timeless round shape ensures they never go out of style, providing a luxury look that lasts a lifetime.

Specifications:

  • Material: Reinforced Fiber Composite (FRP)

  • Shape: Contemporary Round / Cylindrical

  • Finish: Smooth Matte / Textured (Options available)

  • Usage: Indoor & Outdoor Compatible

  • Drainage: Customizable (Can be drilled for live plants or left solid for faux)

column3:
Bring the vibrant energy of the tropics into your interior with our 5.5ft Natural-Look Banana Stick Plant. This isn't just a plant; it's a piece of "living" art. Designed to mimic the Musa (Banana) species, this artificial tree captures the bold, leafy aesthetic that is currently trending in high-end interior design and biophilic home styling.

Exotic Elegance & Detail The hallmark of this plant is its unique stick-style trunk. The sturdy, realistic stalks provide a sense of stability and height, while the oversized leaves fan out to create a full, lush canopy. Each leaf is designed with subtle variegation and natural-looking "tears" characteristic of real banana leaves, ensuring that even under close inspection, the plant looks remarkably lifelike.

Designer-Ready Foundation Forget the hassle of finding a matching planter. This tree comes integrated into a premium fancy pot, chosen for its ability to complement the plant's bold silhouette. The pot is weighted to prevent tipping, making it a safe and durable choice for active households with pets or children.

Versatile Styling Power Whether you are aiming for a Mediterranean villa vibe, a coastal bungalow look, or a sleek minimalist office, the Banana Stick Plant fits in seamlessly. Its large leaves provide an excellent "green screen" to soften corners or frame furniture, instantly making any space feel more relaxed and inviting.

Specifications:

  • Total Height: Approximately 5.5 Feet (66 inches)

  • Leaf Material: Real-Touch Coated Silk

  • Stem Style: Structured Banana "Stick" Stalks

  • Pot Type: Designer Fancy Planter (Included)

  • Durability: UV-resistant and dust-repellent coating
